description: Use this API to replicate the specified bus subsystem in a bus subsystem file. This bus subsystem file may then be recalled at a later time to restore the specified bus subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = bsysmem(sid, sfile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid bus subsystem id. valid bus subsystem ids range from 0 to 11. (input).
